annotation_policy: CMT and Koenigsbergian annotations derived from MIPVU-reviewed metaphorical and uncertain lexical units. Each instance cites at least one MIPVU ID with decision_type in MIPVU_METAPHOR_OR_UNCERTAIN_DECISIONS.

entailments: military conduct is evaluated through glory, honor, or spirit language
Military virtue is understood through honor, animation, and public radiance.
cmt.rival_reading: The terms may be conventional military praise, but the source-domain contrast remains plausible in this register.
cmt.justification: MIPVU review rule 'washington-honor-register' marked 1 unit(s) as metaphor-related or uncertain in this sentence.
